post.content:
Status: Experienced, MS CS Top 30 CS school
Position: SWE Intern at Uber
Location: San Francisco, CA
Date: April 1, 2022

Interview Process : There were a total of 2 virtual rounds. 

Round 1 (1 hour):
 - Resume dicussion
 - Coding question 1 : Smallest ancestor of two nodes.
 - Coding question 2 : Don't remember exactly but it was a DFS related question. 
 - Complexity analysis for both questions.

Round 2 (1 hour):
- Resume discussion
- There was one question that was based on graphs. 
- Complexity Analysis

Initially I was unable to come up with optimized solution in the second round. The interviewer was nice and allowed me to code the basic solution. While coding he had me analyse various cases which allowed me to reach the optimal solution.
